executiveSummary: The scanner detected an issue related to Missing DMARC DNS Record. This represents a security risk on the target asset.
riskExplanation: The exposure of this module (dns) allows external clients to gather detail, potentially assisting in targeted reconnaissance. No DMARC record found at _dmarc.sqauto.zeraynce.com. DMARC enforces SPF and DKIM alignment and provides abuse reporting.
businessImpact: Allowing legacy properties to persist increases vulnerability rates, potentially leading to compliance failures under modern regulations like PCI-DSS.
attackScenarios: An attacker retrieves the disclosures from dns to identify misconfigured interfaces and executes tailored exploit scripts.
